faqs.question: How much does wasp removal cost in Greenpoint?
faqs.answer: Wasp removal in Greenpoint typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on the size and location of the nest, accessibility, and severity of the infestation. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a wasp nest in Greenpoint?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency wasp removal services throughout Greenpoint. Most wasp nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, and we can typically arrive within 2-4 hours of your call during business hours.

faqs.question: Is wasp removal safe for my family and pets in Greenpoint?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use professional-grade treatments that are highly effective against wasps while being safe for your family and pets when applied by our licensed technicians. We follow strict safety protocols and provide clear instructions for any temporary precautions needed after treatment.

faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in Greenpoint, Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Greenpoint commonly sees yellow jackets, paper wasps, and hornets, especially near the waterfront areas and parks. These wasps often build nests under eaves, in attics, wall voids, and around outdoor spaces. Our team has extensive experience identifying and safely removing all local wasp species.
